case_title: JUN KUBOTA VS. PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES,LLC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUBOTA, JUN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES,LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
